chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-635 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 01-04-2019 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Shahani, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant state that the party has taken the brief from him. None is present for the applicant. It appears that after filing of this application, the applicant has lost his interest; therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
